description_long: This is a tall, rectangular metal storage locker with a muted green finish and visible signs of wear and rust, especially near the bottom edges. The front features two vertically aligned doors, each equipped with a simple rectangular handle and a set of three horizontal ventilation slits near the top. The sides of the locker display a series of diagonal, raised ridges that add structural rigidity and a distinctive industrial look. The back panel is plain, lacking any vents or handles, and shows similar weathering as the rest of the body. The overall construction suggests durability and security, suitable for storing personal or work-related items. The utilitarian design and robust materials indicate it is intended for use in environments where both function and resilience are prioritized.
description: A tall, weathered green metal storage locker with double doors, horizontal vents, and diagonal ridges on the sides. It features sturdy handles and a utilitarian, industrial appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing diagonal, raised ridges running from top left to bottom right, with visible weathering and no handles or vents.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two doors with rectangular handles and three horizontal ventilation slits on each door near the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, with diagonal ridges and weathered surface, lacking any doors or handles.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, flat panel with no vents, handles, or ridges, but with visible wear and rust at the bottom.
